title: ernestia tenella
intro: Ernestia tenella is a plant species of the family Rubiaceae, commonly known as the Ernestia tenella tree or shrub. It is found in the tropical regions of Central and South America. The medicinal properties of Ernestia tenella include its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. Ernestia tenella has been traditionally used to treat digestive issues, fever, and respiratory problems, and can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions for its health benefits.
